ddls:
CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "main_category" TEXT /* Main category of the campaign (e.g., Games) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Specific category of the campaign (e.g., Tabletop Games) */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the campaign is funded (e.g., USD) */,
  "pledged_amount" REAL /* Total amount pledged to the campaign */,
  "goal_amount" REAL /* Funding goal amount for the campaign */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the campaign */,
  "backers_count" INTEGER /* Number of backers supporting the campaign */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the creator who launched the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (e.g., active, completed, canceled) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the campaign was launched */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the campaign */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the campaign's main image */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the campaign's promotional video */,
  "stretch_goals" TEXT /* List of stretch goals for the campaign */,
  "reward_tiers" TEXT /* List of reward tiers and their details */,
  "faq" TEXT /* Frequently asked questions and answers */,
  "updates_count" INTEGER /* Number of updates posted by the creator */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the campaign has received */,
  "shares_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the campaign has been shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., creator, backer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* User's website or social media links */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for contact purposes */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backers" (
  "backer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is the backer */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign being backed */,
  "backed_amount" REAL /* Amount pledged by the backer */,
  "backed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the backer pledged */,
  "reward_tier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reward tier the backer selected */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the backer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the backer's pledge (e.g., pending, confirmed, refunded) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments from the backer */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the backer's identity should be kept anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("backer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_reward_tier_id FOREIGN KEY ("reward_tier_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("reward_tiers"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backers_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "main_category" TEXT /* Main category to which the category belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category's image */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code (e.g., USD, EUR) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Currency symbol (e.g., $, €) */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Current exchange rate to a base currency (e.g., USD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign being tracked */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, milestone) */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  "changed_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the change occurred */,
  "change_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the change is visible to the public */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_history_change_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("change_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_history_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)
